description_long: This object is a cylindrical snack package with a slightly tapered body and a flat top and bottom. The exterior is uniformly black, with a smooth, glossy finish that reflects light subtly. The top surface features a recessed circular opening, suggesting it may be a canister or tube-style snack container. There are no visible labels, graphics, or text on any side, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The object appears to be made primarily of plastic, with a hollow interior likely containing snack items such as chips or pretzels. Its size and shape are typical for single-serving or small multi-serving snack canisters found in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black cylindrical snack canister with a recessed top opening and a glossy, label-free exterior.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the cylindrical body and the recessed circular opening on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, smooth sides and the uniform black color.
description_view_2: Opposite angled view, again showing the top opening and the canister's taper.
description_view_3: Top-down view clearly displaying the recessed circular opening and the flat top surface.
